content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape with VIX elevated at 18.64, Nifty flat near 24,177 after a wide intraday range. Strong defensive bid in FMCG and pharma, power cluster extended, IT pressured by Infy results later today. Book is 79% deployed — capital preservation and position management outweigh new entries. Only 48 minutes to close limits new CNC conviction trades.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact: Q4 FY26 PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, sector leader in PSU bank pack. Today's +2.29% recovery shows buyers defending. Set SL at 74 (below recent consolidation zone, ~4% below CMP) and target 88 (HDFC Sec TP Rs 90 roughly). Risk-reward ~3:1 from here."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 960.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strongest mover in book (+10.6% today on Q4 beat + analyst upgrades to Rs 1,160-1,350). Trail SL up to 960 (locks in breakeven-plus buffer, just below Apr-20 close). Target 1100 aligned with Morgan Stanley TP. Let winner run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge with VIX at 18.6. Gold thesis intact (Goldman $5,400, JPM $5,055 TPs). SL at 119 (~4% below CMP, below 50DMA cushion). Target 135 pre 52W high retest."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1650.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to new 52W high (+7.3% today). Trail SL to entry (1650) for breakeven protection. Target 1850 below consensus 2000-2300 range. Let winner run on summer demand + Nabha deal catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.63,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout print (+27% PAT beat, +18% volume growth) drove stock to 52W high. SL at 1365 (~3.4% below CMP, just below today's low). Target 1500. Premium valuation caps upside but momentum + defensive bid supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Broke out to new 52W high today (+5.85%). SL 1015 (below recent consolidation near prior resistance turned support). Target 1130. Exit before Q4 result on Apr 27 to avoid binary event risk — max_hold 7 days covers this window."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "3.7x volume surge but negative fundamental backdrop (4 Form 483 observations, open warning letters, negative 3Y growth). SL tight at 655 (~5% below CMP). Target 745. Exit before Apr 29 Q4 print — binary risk unfavorable given red flags."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG bid +6.55% today. SL 2290 (below today's low, ~3.7% cushion). Target 2520 near analyst TP range. Exit before Apr 30 Q4 print to avoid binary risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh 52W high region. SL at 388 (below pivot/S1 confluence). Target 430 (52W high). Summer demand thesis + regulated utility safety. Q4 results May 15, within hold window — will reassess closer."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 4,
      "reasoning": "Extended (+40% in 1 month, overbought, ASM Stage 1). SL tight at 200 (below today's low ~6.7% below CMP allows room but caps risk). Target 235. Must exit before Apr 29 Q4 concall — binary event risk on already-extended name. Power cluster already heavy (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) — no adds."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Set protective SL; thesis intact on strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 960.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail up to protect ~+2% on strongest winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, set floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1650.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven trail on new 52W high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "Set SL below today's low to protect gains from Q4-beat rally."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh breakout, SL below prior resistance turned support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL given red flags; plan to exit before Apr 29 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "Exit before Apr 30 binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout floor below pivot support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended position on ASM list; exit before Apr 29 Q4 concall."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS — strong standalone beat, but stock has +9% already today, no entry at extended levels. Watch for pullback to Rs 8,400-8,500. AUROPHARMA — buyback floor at Rs 1,475 but CMP 1,434 below it; interesting spread play if it holds. PIRAMALFIN — extended +12% after prior weakness; wait for base. DEEPAKNTR, JIOFINL, WIPRO, GAIL — monitor only, no actionable setup today. INFY results post-close today = avoid IT re-entries until reaction clears.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed, at the deployment cap. No new entries today — focus is entirely on risk management and trailing stops on winners. Power cluster concentration: TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER = ~INR 159k (~16% of portfolio) — at the cluster limit, no adds. Multiple holdings have binary Q4 events in next 4-10 days (AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — exit plans built into max_hold_days. VIX at 18.64 warrants defensive positioning; GOLDBEES + HINDUNILVR + NESTLEIND provide hedge. Deployment hysteresis rule active: default stance on new entries is NO_ACTION until existing book is de-risked or shows materially positive P&L."
}
